items.title: Live: Trump tells allies 'get involved quickly' in securing Strait of Hormuz

items.content: The US president hits out at European allies, who he says "weren't that enthusiastic" about helping, as Iranian drones and missiles closed the shipping channel. Follow live.

items.title: Iran war 'not a matter for NATO', says Germany, as Trump demands Hormuz help

items.content: Donald Trump tells US allies "get involved quickly" in unblocking the Strait of Hormuz shipping channel, while warning members of NATO the alliance faces a "very bad" future if they do not do their bit.
